findings.evidence: `Regulator.lean` already contains the exact result and rank-zero criteria at lines 47-90, while every new theorem at `RegulatorLowerBounds.lean` lines 46-98 is an immediate corollary of those declarations.
findings.fix: Move the declarations from `RegulatorLowerBounds.lean` into `TauCeti/NumberTheory/EffectiveBounds/Regulator.lean` near `regulator_eq_one_of_rank_eq_zero`, `rank_eq_zero_of_card_infinitePlace_eq_one`, and `rank_eq_zero_of_finrank_eq_one`; delete the extra wrapper file unless later positive-rank lower-bound material needs it.
findings.issue: This file splits direct corollaries of the existing rank-zero regulator theory into a new module, so users importing the canonical regulator file miss the natural `regulator_eq_one_of_*` and `one_le_regulator_of_*` variants.

summary: The new API is in the wrong home: these are reusable rank-zero regulator corollaries and should live with the existing rank-zero regulator file, not in a separate lower-bound wrapper module.
